name: fact-coupling-gate
title: spec-drift v2-B: fact-level co-change couplings over the fact-delta
description: Author fact-level co-change couplings over ctx.fact_delta() + ctx.changed_paths(): a watched fact-delta (symbol/import/call added/removed) whose required companion file is absent from the same diff is a gated finding. Surgical, not a wholesale must_update_if_changed rewrite — only promote couplings that are always-true at fact level; keep non-fact-expressible hints advisory. Decide drift_couplings retire-vs-keep.
creator: oydodo
